title: Beef Stew with a Kick
description: A hearty beef stew infused with the bold flavors of andalusian spices and a touch of fiery heat. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the andalusian spices, hot sauce, red wine, beef broth, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2-1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Add the potatoes and continue to cook for another 30 minutes, or until they are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
Let the stew rest for 10-15 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
